DP.261.0000:
Welcome.
This is Team Galactic Headqu...\f
I’m sorry, this is the Galactic
Veilstone Building.\f
Cosmic energy for the win!\f
Wouldn’t it be wonderful if we
could harness that boundless energy?
DP.261.0001:
Welcome.
This is Team Galactic Headqu...\f
I’m sorry, this is the Galactic
Veilstone Building.\f
We have no public events planned
at this time.
DP.261.0002:
Team Galactic conducts R&D around
the clock here.\f
We focus on the development of new
energy resources.
DP.261.0003:
This is where we, Team Galactic, work.
What are we supposed to do?\f
I’m not sure how, but we’re supposed
to chase our dream.\f
Our dream of making a wonderful
new world!
DP.261.0004:
We, Team Galactic, will take everything
that can be taken!\f
We will eliminate everything that is
not needed!\f
That is Team Galactic’s policy!
DP.261.0005:
We, Team Galactic, will take everything
that can be taken!\f
We will eliminate everything that is
not needed!\f
That is Team Galactic’s policy!\f
At least it used to be.
There’s nothing left now...
DP.261.0006:
You’re too young for us...
You can join us when you’re older.
DP.261.0007: I wonder where our boss went...
DP.261.0008:
Saturn: So, it’s you...\f
I’ve heard about you and what took
place at the Spear Pillar.\f
What our boss really wanted...
Even I don’t know that.\f
His confident manner of speaking...
His logical words...\f
I think people just became so
enthralled by him.\f
I allowed myself to believe his words
because I wanted to see the world\r
he intended to make.\f
I’ve been left in charge of this
HQ building and the remnants of\r
the membership...\f
The decision on what Team Galactic
should do rests with me...\f
But I’ve learned that extremism
is never the solution...
DP.261.0009:
The door is locked.
A special key is needed.
DP.261.0010:
The door is locked.
A special key is needed.\f
Use the Galactic Key?
DP.261.0012:
The Team Galactic credo!
Everything belongs to Team Galactic!\f
Look beyond the world--space will
become Team Galactic’s!
